opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My usual painkillers aren't touching this — the pain is gnawing a hole straight through my stomach to my back, and I'm losing weight every day.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My long-standing belly pain has flared up terribly over the last two days after a heavy fatty meal and my oxycodone isn't working at all; I can't get on top of it at home.

symptom_narrative.onset: a severe flare over the last 48 hours after a big fatty meal, on top of a dull ache I've had for years
symptom_narrative.duration: the background ache is constant and long-standing; this severe flare has been going for two days
symptom_narrative.character: a deep, boring, gnawing pain in the upper belly that drills straight through to my back
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it has ever been — my usual painkillers aren't touching it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: high in the middle of my belly, going straight through to my back
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: there all the time now and much worse since the fatty meal
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: leaning and bending forward eases it a little; nothing else helps
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat and eating make it worse, especially fatty food
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've been losing weight fast even though I'm still eating normally, and my stools are bulky, pale, greasy and float and are hard to flush away and smell awful
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had chronic pancreatitis for years with this kind of pain, but it's never been this bad or refused to settle like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't get comfortable — I keep bending forward to try to ease it and I can't do much at all

past_medical_history.how_managed: pancreatic enzyme capsules with meals and strong painkillers

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: brittle diabetes that is very hard to control
past_medical_history.how_managed: insulin injections (a long-acting and a mealtime one)

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: used to drink heavily but have been off alcohol completely for two years

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: insulin — a basal and a mealtime dose

social_history_volunteered.alcohol: completely off alcohol for the last two years; used to drink heavily
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: struggling to manage complex long-term illness; worried the painkillers aren't enough and about how much I'm relying on them

objective_data_offered.value: about 55 kg on my home scales — I've dropped roughly 8 kg over the last three months
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported from home bathroom scales; no calibrated baseline weight available

objective_data_offered.value: bulky, pale, greasy stools that float, are hard to flush and smell very foul
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient description only; not directly observed

objective_data_offered.value: I keep bending and leaning forward at the waist because it takes the edge off the pain
